docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,150.00 FILED BY CORTEZ, LOUIS RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, LOUIS RAMON
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, LOUIS RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA
DECLARATION -STATEMENT OF FACTS AND EVIDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CORTEZ, LOUIS RAMON SAN FRANCISCO SPCA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRANDY VAUSE, CHIEF STRATEGY & ADVANCEMENT OFFICER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GRUBER. PLAINTIFF LOUIS RAMON CORTEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRANDY VAUSE, CHIEF STRATEGY & ADVANCEMENT OFFICER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. ***DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES*** PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, LOUIS RAMON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SPCA PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE EVIDENCE OF ANY DAMAGES SUFFERED UNDER THE ALLEGATIONS PROVIDED IN ITS COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
